title: More Decorative Blocks
description: This mod adds around 240 new blocks for each of 10 different categories and extracts textures from their respective vanilla Minecraft block
body:
This mod adds around 280 of blocks for every category. (11 categories for now) (More categories in future) IMPORTANT ! The mod require [Blackwolf Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/blackwolf-library) to work ! **The category for now are:** - Buttons - Carpets - Doors - Fences and Gates - Ladders (available since Minecraft 1.21.8 for Forge, Fabric and NeoForge) - Pressure Plates - Slabs - Vertical Slabs (available since Minecraft 1.21.8 for Forge and NeoForge) - Stairs - Trapdoors - Walls The mod extracts textures from their respective vanilla Minecraft block. So they can be overriden with resource packs as usual. Compatible with all resource packs. It's compatible with: [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) To create these new blocks you must first create the Frame of a specific category. Below examples of the recipe. You can use any blocks of the respective category from the vanilla game for the recipe. (For example: for Frame Door you can use a Wooden Door, for a Frame Trapdoor you can use Iron Trapdoor) You can now use the Frame with a block whose texture you want. Below are some examples. Some blocks emit light like their respective blocks. ***Feel free to use this mod on your modpack***

Blocks

Some Buttons

Is a special decorative block and you need particular crafting, you can use [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) to see it. ![Partener server host link](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/112d23b8-9986-4823-80de-d312484cf8c8.webp) BisectHosting offers quick, simple and high quality server hosting with over a dozen locations available across the world, ensuring low latency.
